title: astragalus vallis-astoris
intro: Astragalus vallis-astoris, also known as milk vetch or meadow milk vetch, is a perennial plant species in the pea family (Fabaceae). It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and immunomodulatory effects. The plant is believed to offer various health benefits, such as boosting the immune system, reducing stress and fatigue, and improving cardiovascular health. Astragalus vallis-astoris is typically prepared as a decoction, tincture, or capsule, and is often used in traditional Chinese medicine and modern herbalism.
